findings.quote: Count the jars, and the safest vault is the fullest. Open them, and it is not.
findings.note: genre/temperature: aphoristic antithesis and a single-study reversal worked to a symmetrical close read like an essay built to be a test passage; authentic long ELF exemplars (var-2026-verb1-ELF-033 Indie Bookstores, var-2026-verb2-ELF-036 Killer Cats) are multi-source reportage with hard sourced numbers and digressions, not one metaphor hammered. Question style itself is HP-plausible; passage sits at the edge of the exemplar range.

findings.quote: the tide is free, but the boat is not, and it is the boat that sets the price
findings.note: genre: same manufactured single-pilot reversal skeleton as elf-b6-001, closed on an aphorism; concrete residue thinner than the reportorial exemplars var-2026-verb1-ELF-033 and var-2026-verb2-ELF-036 (invented institutions, no hard sourced figures), the uniform rhythm places it at the edge of range rather than squarely inside it.
